title: Stop Building. Start Posting. (How I Signed 2 Multi-Billion Dollar Clients)

eval.summary: Generic GTM advice for AI agency owners: stop building, start posting on LinkedIn to generate inbound leads. Speaker claims two multi-billion dollar clients sourced from content. No tools, techniques, frameworks, or integrations discussed. Pure motivational/sales advice with zero technical content. No relevance to stack architecture, automation pipelines, or any Veritas system layer.
eval.fit_rationale: Content is a motivational marketing pitch with no technical, architectural, or integration signal relevant to any Veritas pipeline or stack layer.

stack_evaluation.reasoning: Fails P3 entirely — no measurable token efficiency signal or tooling to evaluate. Fails P7 — no component, pattern, or technique that could overlap with or extend any existing stack component. Zero actionable technical content; the Claude mention is anecdotal ('clients Google you or type you into Claude'), not an integration point.
